text: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],
tl: Ya-aiyuhal muzzammil

text: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -
tl: Qumil laila illaa qaleelaa

text: Half of it - or subtract from it a little
tl: Nisfahooo awin qus minhu qaleelaa

text: Or add to it, and recite the Qur’ān with measured recitation.
tl: Aw zid 'alaihi Wa-rattilil Qur'aana tarteela

text: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.
tl: Innaa sanulqee 'alaika qawlan saqeelaa

text: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.
tl: Inn naashi'atal laili hiya ashadddu wat-anw Wa-aqwamu qeelaa

text: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.
tl: Inna laka fin nahaari sabhan taweelaa

text: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.
tl: Wazkuris ma rabbika Wa-tabattal ilaihi tabteelaa

text: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.
tl: Rabbul mashriqi wal-maghriibi laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fattakhizhu wakeelaa

text: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.
tl: Wasbir 'alaa maa yaqoo-loona wahjurhum hajran jameelaa

text: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.
tl: Wa-zarnee walmukaz-zibeena ulin na'mati Wa-mahhilhum qaleelaa

text: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
tl: Inna ladainaaa ankaalanw Wa-jaheemaa

text: And food that chokes and a painful punishment -
tl: Wa-ta'aaman zaa ghussa-tinw wa'azaaban aleemaa

text: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.
tl: Yawma tarjuful ardu waljibaalu Wa-kaanatil jibaalu kaseebam maheelaa

text: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.
tl: Innaa arsalnaaa ilaikum rasoolan shaahidan 'aleykum kamaaa arsalnaaa ilaa Fir'awna rasoolaa

text: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.
tl: Fa'asaa Fir'awnur Rasoola fa-akhaznaahu akhzanw wabeelaa

text: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?
tl: Fakaifa tattaqoona in kafartum yawmany yaj'alul wildaana sheeba

text: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.
tl: Assamaaa'u munfatirum bih; kaana wa'duhoo maf'oola

text: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.
tl: Inna haazihee tazkiratun fa-man shaaa'at takhaza ilaa Rabbihee sabeelaa

text: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muḥammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allāh determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur’ān. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allāh and others fighting for the cause of Allāh. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakāh and loan Allāh a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allāh. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.
tl: Inna Rabbaka ya'lamu annaka taqoomu adnaa min sulusa-yil laili Wa-nisfahoo Wa-sulusahoo Wa-taaa'ifatum minal lazeena ma'ak; wal-laahu yuqaddirul laila wanna-haar; 'alima al lan tuhsoohu fataaba 'alaikum faqra'oo maa tayassara minal quraan; 'alima an sa-yakoonu minkum mardaa Wa-aakharoona yadriboona fil ardi yabtaghoona min fadlil laahi Wa-aakharoona yuqaatiloona fee sabeelil laahi faqra'oo ma tayassara minhu Wa-aqeemus salaata Wa-aatuz zakaata Wa-aqridul laaha qardan hasanaa; Wa-maa tuqadimoo li-anfusikum min khairin tajidoohu 'indal laahi huwa khayranw Wa-a'zama ajraa; wastaghfirul laahaa innal laaha ghafoorur raheem.
